title: cola lasiantha
intro: Cola lasiantha, also known as the African cola or West African cola, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cola lasiantha include its ability to support digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Cola lasiantha is often used as a stimulant, diuretic, and expectorant, and is typically consumed as a tea or infused in hot water.
